name: Dan Da Dan FULL! Character RPG
description:
👻 Dandadan RPG where almost ALL major characters are present! Under modification🚧

👾Create your own long lasting scenarios with the base of Dan da dan 👾

❌STRICTLY NO STEALING, APPLIES TO ALL MY BOTS, DEFINITION IS ONLY VISIBLE FOR OBSERVATION AND UNDERSTANDING OF HOW I MAKE MY BOTS❌

--

Characters added and to be edited: Ken Takakura (Okarun), Momo Ayase, granny Seiko Ayase, Jiji Enjoji, Aira Shiratori, Turbo Granny, Bamora (Vamola), serpoians (serpo)

➕Want to add characters? Tell me in the feedback place with an upvote. You're unique if you think I'd add the character when you're demanding it with a downvote like that!➕

I will accept all constructive criticism and downvotes UNLESS:

-Blank downvotes

Why? Because they do not help me with the improvement and development of the bot, I also just find it unsatisfying and unnecessary.

-"Bot keeps talking for me!"

Why? Well, anyone who says this is just stressing out the creators. It's usually your own fault if your responses are too short or it's just JanitorAI, but generally, it is a small problem.

And that's it.

🍂ALL TIPS I HAVE TO PREVENT MALFUNCTIONING OF THE BOT🍂

⛰️Put a little more effort in your responses. I'm putting lots of effort into the bot, you can not just write one word nd complain that the RPG isn't going your way.

🌱Edit the messages. Remove the parts where the bot spoke for you, change incorrect words, etc.

🏝️Select and write a good prompt for you. If you're having a specific problem, you can attempt to write that out in your prompts. I will also try to add rules that'll help with the bot's writing for you.

All characters were aged up to 18+.

Please leave your opinions and requests down below. I apologise for ignoring most of your RPG requests. This is because I haven't actually watched those shows or read those mangas yet, however, I would've gladly made it if I did. #dandadan #anime #RPG
creator: GrassToucher99
